---
title: "Home"
site: workflowr::wflow_site
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    toc: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

- **Welcome to My Research Website**
  
- **General Summary** 
Click on this [Literature Review](literature.html) to see my results
  
- **Overview of the Data Set**
  
- **SC Model**
  
  - Overview of the Model
  - Notations for the Stan Model
  - Maps and Boxplots
  
- **SC AR Model**
  
  - Overview of the AR(1) Model
  - Maps and Boxplots
  - Trace Plots for Parameters
